title: leontodon incanus var. anomalus
intro: Leontodon incanus var. anomalus, also known as the woolly hawk's beard, is a rare and lesser-known variety of plant in the dandelion family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Leontodon incanus var. anomalus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
